description: This pipeline overlays greyscale or RGB images based on their annotations, grouping incoming data into categories and producing an output that combines specific image channels.

d44d94f8-d94d-454b-b89e-8ae4f8833865.name: ij1-color-blend-images
d44d94f8-d94d-454b-b89e-8ae4f8833865.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
